# Campaign Brief

## Required

- **Industry:** Urgent care
- **Product:** Accident & injury care
- **Location:** Florida
- **Language:** en-US
- **Audience:** Adults 25-65 post-accident

## Optional

- **Geo focus:** Palm Beach County, Lake Worth
- **Campaign focus:** Search | Lake Worth Accident Exams | Manual CPC

## Raw operator paste

> Lake Worth urgent care clinic needs to drive accident-and-injury exam bookings. Focus the keyword research on the existing "Search | Lake Worth Accident Exams | Manual CPC" campaign — exclude noise from PMax and PIP-hybrid campaigns running elsewhere in the account.
